ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Skimmed MILK powder (28%), sugar, palm oll, WHEAT flour (15.5%). fat-reduced cocoa (4%), emulsifier: lecithins (SOYA), salt, raising agent (sodium bicarbonate), vanillin. May contain HAZELNUTS, MUSTARD.
